example.en: The student requested an official **transcript** of all her university grades.
example.zh: 這名學生申請了一份她所有大學成績的正式成績單。

meaning: 搬；轉換；調動；使換車；使轉校、轉移；調任；換車，轉車

example.en: The company will **transfer** him to its branch office in Singapore.
example.zh: 公司將把他調到位於新加坡的分公司。

meaning: 可轉移的；可轉印的

example.en: The skills you learn here are easily **transferable** to other careers.
example.zh: 你在這裡學到的技能很容易轉移到其他職業上。

meaning: 受讓人，承買人；被調任者

example.en: As the **transferee**, she signed the documents accepting ownership of the property.
example.zh: 作為受讓人，她簽署了文件，接受該房產的所有權。

meaning: 轉移；傳遞；調任

example.en: The **transference** of knowledge from teacher to student takes patience and time.
example.zh: 知識從老師到學生的傳遞需要耐心與時間。

meaning: 讓渡人；讓賣人（= transferor）；遷移者；轉運者；調任者

example.en: As the **transferrer**, he was responsible for completing all the legal paperwork.
example.zh: 作為讓渡人，他負責完成所有的法律文件。

meaning: 使變形；使改觀；美化，理想化

example.en: A fresh coat of paint can completely **transfigure** an old, tired room.
example.zh: 一層新漆能徹底改變一個老舊破敗的房間。

meaning: 輸（血）；注射；移注；傾注；灌輸

example.en: Doctors decided to **transfuse** blood into the patient after the accident.
example.zh: 醫生決定在事故後為病人輸血。

meaning: 可傾注的；可灌輸的；可輸血的

example.en: The donated plasma was carefully tested to confirm it was safely **transfusible**.
example.zh: 捐贈的血漿經過仔細檢驗，以確認它可以安全輸用。

meaning: 傾注，灌輸；滲透；輸血；輸液

example.en: The patient needed an urgent blood **transfusion** after losing so much blood.
example.zh: 病人在失血過多後需要緊急輸血。

meaning: 違反，違背（規則、法律等）；侵犯，越過（限度、範圍等）

example.en: Anyone who **transgresses** the safety rules will be removed from the site.
example.zh: 任何違反安全規則的人都將被逐出工地。

meaning: 頃刻；無常；短暫；稍縱即逝

example.en: The **transience** of youth makes us value each passing year more.
example.zh: 青春的短暫使我們更加珍惜逝去的每一年。

meaning: 短暫居住者；過往旅客；候鳥 / adj. 短暫的；一時的；瞬間的；暫住的，路 過的

example.en: The hostel mainly serves **transient** workers who stay only a few nights.
example.zh: 這家旅舍主要服務只住幾晚的過往工人。

meaning: 過渡；過渡時期；轉變，變遷；變革（+from/to）

example.en: The country's **transition** from dictatorship to democracy was slow but peaceful.
example.zh: 這個國家從獨裁到民主的過渡緩慢卻和平。

meaning: 短暫的；瞬息的；無常的

example.en: Fame can be **transitory**, fading almost as quickly as it arrives.
example.zh: 名聲可能是短暫的，幾乎來得多快就消失得多快。

meaning: 翻譯，轉譯（+from/into）；（用另外的詞語）解釋，說明，表達（+into）、 翻譯；被翻譯；從事翻譯工作

example.en: She was hired to **translate** the report from German into English.
example.zh: 她受僱將這份報告從德文翻譯成英文。

meaning: 譯者，譯員，翻譯；翻譯家；翻譯機

example.en: A skilled **translator** must understand both cultures, not just the two languages.
example.zh: 一位優秀的譯者必須了解兩種文化，而不只是兩種語言。

meaning: 半透明

example.en: The **translucence** of the curtains let soft daylight fill the room.
example.zh: 窗簾的半透明特性讓柔和的日光灑滿整個房間。

meaning: 半透明的；透明的；清澈的

example.en: The lampshade was made of thin, **translucent** paper that glowed softly.
example.zh: 燈罩是用薄薄的半透明紙做成的，散發著柔和的光。

meaning: 能傳送的；能透射的

example.en: The disease is highly **transmissible** through contaminated water and unwashed hands.
example.zh: 這種疾病透過受污染的水和未清洗的雙手極易傳播。

meaning: 傳送；傳達；傳染，傳播

example.en: Vaccines greatly reduce the **transmission** of many dangerous infectious diseases.
example.zh: 疫苗大幅減少了許多危險傳染病的傳播。

meaning: 傳送，傳達；傳（光、熱、聲等）；傳動、播送信號；發報

example.en: The station can **transmit** signals to ships hundreds of miles away.
example.zh: 這座電台能將訊號發送給數百英里外的船隻。

meaning: 使變形（或變質）；使變化

example.en: Medieval alchemists hoped to **transmute** ordinary metals into pure gold.
example.zh: 中世紀的煉金術士希望把普通金屬變質成純金。

meaning: 透明的；清澈的；顯而易見的；一目了然的

example.en: The lake water was so **transparent** that we could see the bottom.
example.zh: 湖水如此清澈透明，我們能看見湖底。

meaning: 被人知道，透露；發生、使蒸發；使散發；使排出

example.en: It later **transpired** that the manager had known about the problem all along.
example.zh: 後來人們才得知，那位經理一直都知道這個問題。

meaning: 移植；移種（+from/to）；(使)移居（+to）

example.en: Surgeons can now **transplant** a healthy kidney from one person to another.
example.zh: 外科醫生現在能將健康的腎臟從一個人移植到另一個人身上。

meaning: 調換，更換；移項

example.en: A simple **transposition** of two letters changed the whole meaning of the word.
example.zh: 兩個字母的簡單調換改變了整個單字的意思。

meaning: 橫向的；橫斷的；橫切的；橫截的 / n. 橫向物；橫軸；橫斷面；橫截軸

example.en: A **transverse** beam runs across the ceiling to support the roof.
example.zh: 一根橫向的橫梁橫跨天花板以支撐屋頂。

meaning: 艱苦勞動，辛勤工作；痛苦，艱難 / v. 艱苦勞動；辛勤努力；經受分娩的陣痛

example.en: After months of **travail**, the team finally completed the difficult project.
example.zh: 經過數月的艱苦勞動，團隊終於完成了這個困難的專案。

meaning: （對人或文學作品等的）滑稽模仿；拙劣的模仿；歪曲；曲解 / v. 滑稽地模 仿，拙劣的模仿；歪曲

example.en: The film was a clumsy **travesty** of the much-loved original novel.
example.zh: 這部電影是對那本廣受喜愛的原著小說拙劣的滑稽模仿。

meaning: 背叛的；不忠的；奸詐的；不牢靠的；危險的；變化莫測的

example.en: The melting ice made the path dangerously slippery and quite **treacherous**.
example.zh: 融化的冰使這條小徑危險地濕滑，相當凶險難測。

meaning: 背叛，變節；背信；背叛（或變節）行為；背信棄義的舉動

example.en: The general was executed for his **treachery** against the king.
example.zh: 這位將軍因背叛國王的變節行為而被處決。

meaning: 叛逆的；不忠的；背信的

example.en: Plotting against the government was considered a **treasonable** act punishable by death.
example.zh: 密謀反對政府被視為一種可處死刑的叛逆行為。

meaning: 論文；專著（+on/upon）

example.en: She wrote a long **treatise** on the economics of developing countries.
example.zh: 她撰寫了一篇關於開發中國家經濟學的長篇論文。

meaning: 三倍的，三重的；最高聲部的；唱（或奏）最高聲部的 / n. 三倍，三重；（一 杯）三倍分量的酒；最高聲部；最高聲部歌手；最高聲部樂器 / v. 使成三倍、變成三倍

example.en: The company hopes to **treble** its profits within the next three years.
example.zh: 公司希望在未來三年內使利潤增為三倍。

meaning: 三倍地；三重地；高聲地；尖聲地

example.en: The new factory made the firm's output rise **trebly** within one year.
example.zh: 新工廠使公司的產量在一年內增為三倍。

meaning: 巨大的，極大的；極度的，驚人的

example.en: The new bridge was a **tremendous** achievement for the small engineering team.
example.zh: 這座新橋對這個小型工程團隊來說是一項巨大的成就。

meaning: 震顫；顫抖；震動；微動

example.en: A slight **tremor** in his hands showed how nervous he really was.
example.zh: 他雙手輕微的顫抖顯示出他內心有多緊張。

meaning: 震顫的；顫抖的；膽小的；害怕的

example.en: Her **tremulous** voice betrayed the fear she was trying hard to hide.
example.zh: 她顫抖的聲音洩露了她極力想隱藏的恐懼。

meaning: （言辭等）銳利的；鋒利的；有力的；中肯的；有效的

example.en: The reviewer made a **trenchant** criticism that exposed the book's main weakness.
example.zh: 這位評論者提出了一針見血的批評，揭露了該書的主要弱點。

meaning: 驚恐，慌張，不安；震顫，顫抖

example.en: She opened the exam envelope with considerable **trepidation** and trembling hands.
example.zh: 她懷著相當的不安和顫抖的雙手打開了考試信封。

meaning: 支架；擱凳；棧橋，高架橋

example.en: The old railway crossed the valley on a tall wooden **trestle**.
example.zh: 那條舊鐵路藉由一座高大的木製棧橋跨越山谷。

meaning: 三人一組；三件一套；三合一；三和弦

example.en: The three songs form a **triad** united by a single shared theme.
example.zh: 這三首歌曲組成一個三件一套的組合，由單一共同主題串連。

meaning: （古羅馬的）護民官；軍團司令官；公民權利保護者

example.en: In ancient Rome, a **tribune** was elected to protect ordinary citizens' rights.
example.zh: 在古羅馬，護民官是被選出來保護平民權利的。

meaning: 欺騙；奸計

example.en: The magician amazed the crowd with clever sleight of hand and **trickery**.
example.zh: 魔術師用巧妙的手法和騙術讓觀眾驚嘆不已。

meaning: 三色的 / n. 三色旗；法國國旗

example.en: The team marched proudly behind their bright **tricolor** flag.
example.zh: 球隊自豪地走在他們鮮豔的三色旗後面。

meaning: 三輪車，三輪腳踏車

example.en: The toddler pedalled his little red **tricycle** around the quiet garden.
example.zh: 那個幼兒踩著他的小紅三輪車繞著安靜的花園。

meaning: 三齒魚叉；（神話中的）三叉戟 / adj. 三叉的

example.en: In the painting, the sea god raised his three-pronged **trident** high.
example.zh: 在那幅畫中，海神高高舉起他的三叉戟。

meaning: 每三年的，三年一次的；連續三年的 / n. 三年一次的節日，三週年紀念

example.en: The committee holds a **triennial** meeting once every three years.
example.zh: 委員會每三年舉行一次三年一度的會議。

meaning: 整齊；整潔

example.en: The garden was admired for the **trimness** of its neatly clipped hedges.
example.zh: 這座花園因其修剪整齊的樹籬之整潔而備受讚賞。

meaning: 三個（人或物）一組；三位一體（+of）；（基督教）三位一體

example.en: The exhibition presented a **trinity** of paintings sharing one historical theme.
example.zh: 這場展覽呈現了三幅一組、共享同一歷史主題的畫作。

meaning: 三人一組；三件套；三合一, 三重奏；三重唱, 三重奏曲；三重唱曲

example.en: The jazz **trio** played softly in the corner of the small restaurant.
example.zh: 這個爵士三重奏在小餐廳的角落輕柔地演奏。

meaning: 三倍的；三重的；由三部分構成的；三方的 / v. 使成三倍，三倍於 / n. 三倍 數；三倍量；三個一組

example.en: The recipe requires a **triple** layer of sponge cake and cream.
example.zh: 這道食譜需要三層的海綿蛋糕和奶油。

meaning: 一式三份的；第三份的 / n. 三個相似物之一；一式三份（中的一份） / v. 使成三倍；把……作成一式三份

example.en: Please prepare the contract in **triplicate** so each party keeps a copy.
example.zh: 請將合約準備成一式三份，好讓每一方各保留一份。

meaning: 三個一組；三位一體；三倍（性）；三重（性）；（占星術十二宮中互隔120 度的）三宮的一組

example.en: The design's beauty lies in the **triplicity** of its three balanced parts.
example.zh: 這設計之美在於其三個平衡部分的三位一體。

meaning: 三腳架；三腳凳；三腳桌；三腳臺座

example.en: The photographer steadied her camera on a sturdy three-legged **tripod**.
example.zh: 攝影師把相機穩穩地架在一個堅固的三腳架上。

meaning: 把……分成三份；把……截成三段；三等分

example.en: Using only a compass, can you **trisect** this angle into three equal parts?
example.zh: 只用圓規，你能把這個角三等分成三個相等的部分嗎？

meaning: 平庸的；陳腐的

example.en: The speech was full of **trite** phrases that no longer impressed anyone.
example.zh: 這場演講充滿了陳腐的詞句，再也打動不了任何人。

meaning: （古羅馬）三執政之一；三人領導小組成員之一，三巨擘之一

example.en: Each **triumvir** shared power equally in governing the vast ancient empire.
example.zh: 每位三執政之一在統治這個龐大的古代帝國時平等地分享權力。

meaning: 瑣細的；不重要的；無價值的；淺薄的；無能的；輕浮的

example.en: Please don't waste my time with such **trivial** and unimportant complaints.
example.zh: 請別用這種瑣碎又不重要的抱怨浪費我的時間。

meaning: 令人煩惱的；討厭的；麻煩的，棘手的，困難的

example.en: The leaking pipe became a **troublesome** problem that no one could fix.
example.zh: 漏水的管子成了一個沒人能修好的棘手問題。

meaning: 野蠻；殘酷；刻薄，粗暴

example.en: The dictator ruled with a **truculence** that frightened even his closest allies.
example.zh: 這名獨裁者以一種連最親近的盟友都感到害怕的殘暴進行統治。

meaning: 兇狠的，殘酷的；野蠻的；好戰的，好鬥的

example.en: The **truculent** customer shouted at the staff over a tiny mistake.
example.zh: 那名兇狠的顧客為了一個小錯誤對員工大吼大叫。

meaning: 自明之理；老套，老生常談

example.en: Saying that hard work brings success is something of a **truism**.
example.zh: 說努力工作會帶來成功，算是一種老生常談。

meaning: 誠實的；講真話的；坦率的；（藝術作品等）真實的，如實的

example.en: A **truthful** witness gave the court a clear and honest account.
example.zh: 一位誠實的證人向法庭提供了清楚而坦白的陳述。

meaning: 腫脹的，浮腫的；（言詞等）浮誇的；誇張的

example.en: The report was full of **turgid** language that obscured its simple message.
example.zh: 這份報告充滿了浮誇的語言，掩蓋了它簡單的訊息。

meaning: 奸惡；卑鄙；墮落

example.en: The judge condemned the crime as an act of shocking moral **turpitude**.
example.zh: 法官譴責這項罪行是一種駭人的道德墮落行為。

meaning: 保護；監護；指導；受監護；受教導

example.en: Under the **tutelage** of a master chef, she quickly improved her cooking.
example.zh: 在一位大廚的指導下，她的廚藝迅速進步。

meaning: 保護的；監護的；保護人的；監護人的 / n. 守護神；監護人

example.en: The villagers prayed to their **tutelar** spirit for a good harvest.
example.zh: 村民們向他們的守護神祈求豐收。

meaning: 家庭教師（或輔導教師、大學導師等的）職位（或職責等）；（尤指個別的） 輔導，指導；影響

example.en: She accepted a **tutorship** at the college, guiding first-year students closely.
example.zh: 她接受了該學院的導師職位，密切指導一年級學生。

meaning: 劇痛，刺痛；陣痛（+of）；痛苦；難過；內疚（+of） / v. 使感到劇痛，使刺 痛、感到劇痛，刺痛

example.en: He felt a sudden **twinge** of guilt for forgetting his friend's birthday.
example.zh: 他因忘了朋友的生日而突然感到一陣內疚。

meaning: 典型的，有代表性的；特有的，獨特的；表現特徵的

example.en: Heavy rain in spring is **typical** weather for this coastal region.
example.zh: 春季的大雨是這個沿海地區典型的天氣。

meaning: 為……的典型，具有……的特點；代表，象徵

example.en: This old farmhouse perfectly **typifies** the simple rural life of the past.
example.zh: 這座老農舍完美地代表了過去簡樸的鄉村生活。

meaning: 排字上的；印刷上的，印刷術的

example.en: The editor found several **typographical** errors in the printed first edition.
example.zh: 編輯在印刷的第一版中發現了幾處排印錯誤。

meaning: （活版）印刷術；排印

example.en: Modern **typography** lets designers choose from thousands of different printed fonts.
example.zh: 現代印刷排版讓設計師能從數千種不同的印刷字體中挑選。

meaning: 暴君的；專制君主的；暴君似的；暴虐的；專橫的

example.en: The villagers suffered under the **tyrannical** rule of a cruel lord.
example.zh: 村民們在一位殘暴領主的暴虐統治下受苦。

meaning: 暴政；專制；暴虐，專橫

example.en: The people finally rose up to overthrow years of brutal **tyranny**.
example.zh: 人民最終起身推翻了多年的殘暴暴政。

meaning: 初學者；生手；新手

example.en: As a complete **tyro** at chess, he lost his first ten games.
example.zh: 身為一個徹底的西洋棋新手，他輸掉了頭十盤棋。

meaning: 到處存在的，普遍存在的，無所不在的

example.en: Mobile phones have become **ubiquitous**, appearing in almost every home today.
example.zh: 手機已變得無所不在，如今幾乎出現在每個家庭中。

meaning: 隱祕不明的，別有用心的；在那邊的；較遠的

example.en: I suspect he had some **ulterior** motive for offering to help us.
example.zh: 我懷疑他主動提議幫我們是別有用心。

meaning: 最後的，最終的；基本的，根本的；最初的，最早的 / n. 最終的事物，終極 ，結局；極限；頂點（+in）；基本原則

example.en: The team's **ultimate** goal is to win the national championship next year.
example.zh: 這支球隊的最終目標是明年贏得全國冠軍。

meaning: 最後通牒；最後結論；基本原理

example.en: The workers issued an **ultimatum** demanding higher pay or they would strike.
example.zh: 工人們發出最後通牒，要求加薪，否則就罷工。

meaning: 太陽系以外的；世界以外的；超俗的

example.en: Ancient myths often described gods living in some distant **ultramundane** realm.
example.zh: 古代神話常描述眾神住在某個遙遠的、世界以外的國度。

meaning: 山那邊的；阿爾卑斯山南邊的；支持教皇絕對權力的

example.en: The **ultramontane** villages lie on the southern side of the great mountains.
example.zh: 那些山那邊的村莊位於這座大山的南側。

meaning: 陰影；樹蔭；（成蔭的）簇葉

example.en: We rested in the cool **umbrage** of an ancient spreading oak.
example.zh: 我們在一棵古老而枝葉伸展的橡樹涼爽的樹蔭下休息。

meaning: 無法解釋的，不可理解的；莫名其妙的；無責任的（+for/to）

example.en: For some **unaccountable** reason, the machine suddenly stopped working last night.
example.zh: 由於某種無法解釋的原因，那臺機器昨晚突然停止運轉。

meaning: 不受影響的（+by）；純真的；不裝腔作勢的

example.en: Her warm, **unaffected** manner quickly put every nervous guest at ease.
example.zh: 她溫暖而不做作的態度很快讓每位緊張的客人放鬆下來。

meaning: 全體一致的；一致同意的；無異議的

example.en: The committee reached a **unanimous** decision to approve the new park.
example.zh: 委員會達成一致決定，批准興建這座新公園。

meaning: 同意；全體一致；一致同意

example.en: There was complete **unanimity** among the members about the proposed plan.
example.zh: 成員們對所提出的計劃完全一致同意。

meaning: 不可避免的；不能廢除的

example.en: With so much rain, some flooding in the valley was sadly **unavoidable**.
example.zh: 雨下得這麼大，山谷裡發生一些水患遺憾地無法避免。

meaning: 不能忍受的；令人不能容忍的

example.en: The pain in his injured knee finally became almost **unbearable**.
example.zh: 他受傷膝蓋的疼痛最終變得幾乎令人無法忍受。

meaning: 不適當的，不相稱的；不得體的；（服飾等）不合身的；不相配的

example.en: Such rude behaviour is quite **unbecoming** to a respected public official.
example.zh: 這種無禮的舉止對一位受人尊敬的公職人員來說相當不得體。

meaning: 不信；無信仰；懷疑

example.en: His complete **unbelief** in the rumour kept him calm during the panic.
example.zh: 他對那謠言的全然不信讓他在恐慌中保持鎮定。

meaning: 無偏見的；不偏不倚的；公正的

example.en: A good judge must remain **unbiased** when weighing both sides' arguments.
example.zh: 一位好法官在權衡雙方論點時必須保持公正無偏見。

meaning: （馬等）無轡頭的；無拘束的；放縱的

example.en: Years of **unbridled** spending finally pushed the company into serious debt.
example.zh: 多年來毫無節制的花費最終使公司陷入嚴重債務。

meaning: 不尋常的；罕見的；非凡的，傑出的

example.en: It is **uncommon** to see snow this far south in winter.
example.zh: 在冬天於這麼南邊的地方看到雪是不尋常的。

meaning: 無理的；荒謬的；不公正的；不知恥的；沒良心的

example.en: Charging such desperate families that price was simply **unconscionable** and unfair.
example.zh: 向那些走投無路的家庭收取那種價格根本是無理而不公的。

meaning: 不省人事的，失去知覺的；不知道的，未發覺的（+of） / n. 無意識

example.en: The driver was knocked **unconscious** when his car struck the wall.
example.zh: 當汽車撞上牆壁時，駕駛被撞得失去知覺。

meaning: 注油；塗油；油膏；軟膏

example.en: The priest performed the **unction**, anointing the sick man's forehead with oil.
example.zh: 神父進行了塗油禮，在病人的額頭上塗抹聖油。

meaning: 油的；油膏的；似油的

example.en: The thick cream felt smooth and **unctuous** between her fingers.
example.zh: 那濃稠的乳霜在她指間感覺光滑似油。

meaning: 使醒悟；使不受迷惑

example.en: The honest report finally **undeceived** investors about the firm's true finances.
example.zh: 這份誠實的報告終於讓投資人不再受公司真實財務狀況的蒙蔽。

meaning: 對……要價（或收費）過低；未給（槍等）裝足火藥 / n. 過低的索價；不 足量的充填

example.en: The shop accidentally **undercharged** me, so I went back to pay more.
example.zh: 那家店不小心對我收費過低，所以我回去多付了錢。

meaning: 曝光不足的

example.en: The **underexposed** photographs came out too dark to show any detail.
example.zh: 那些曝光不足的照片洗出來太暗，看不出任何細節。

meaning: 內衣；貼身衣；襯衣

example.en: In winter she wears a warm **undergarment** beneath her woollen sweater.
example.zh: 冬天她會在羊毛衣裡面穿一件保暖的內衣。

meaning: 使人員配備不足 / n. 下屬人員

example.en: Budget cuts forced the hospital to **underman** its busy night shift.
example.zh: 預算削減迫使醫院的繁忙夜班人員配備不足。

meaning: （比對方）廉售；拋售

example.en: The new store will **undersell** its rivals to attract more customers.
example.zh: 這家新店將以低於對手的價格廉售，以吸引更多顧客。

meaning: 比普通小的，小尺寸的；較矮小的

example.en: The fishermen returned the **undersized** fish to the sea to grow.
example.zh: 漁民們把尺寸過小的魚放回海裡讓牠們長大。

meaning: 祕密的；可恥的；狡詐的；人手不足的

example.en: His **underhanded** scheme to steal the contract eventually came to light.
example.zh: 他企圖竊取合約的狡詐陰謀最終被揭發。

meaning: 位於……的下面；置於……之下；構成……的基礎

example.en: Deep distrust seemed to **underlie** every decision the two countries made.
example.zh: 深層的不信任似乎構成了兩國所做每個決定的基礎。

meaning: 手下，走卒，嘍囉，下屬

example.en: The proud manager treated his **underlings** as if they were invisible.
example.zh: 那位自負的經理對待他的下屬就好像他們是隱形人。

meaning: （常指逐漸地）削弱信心、權威等，損害

example.en: Constant criticism can slowly **undermine** a young child's confidence.
example.zh: 不斷的批評會慢慢削弱一個小孩的自信。

meaning: 對…估計過低，低估

example.en: Never **underrate** your opponent, however weak they may appear at first.
example.zh: 絕不要低估你的對手，不管他們起初看起來多麼弱小。

meaning: 對…輕描淡寫；不如實陳述；避重就輕地說

example.en: He tends to **understate** his achievements, rarely mentioning the awards he won.
example.zh: 他傾向於對自己的成就輕描淡寫，很少提及他贏得的獎項。

meaning: 低估；輕視；對…認識不足

example.en: Many people **undervalue** the importance of regular sleep for good health.
example.zh: 許多人低估了規律睡眠對健康的重要性。

meaning: 陰間，地獄；下層社會；黑社會

example.en: The novel explores the criminal **underworld** of a busy port city.
example.zh: 這部小說探討了一座繁忙港口城市的犯罪黑社會。

meaning: （銀行或其他機構）爲…提供財力支援並承擔經濟責任、爲…承擔保險責任， 爲…承保

example.en: The bank agreed to **underwrite** the cost of the risky new venture.
example.zh: 銀行同意為這項高風險新事業的成本提供財力支援並承擔責任。

meaning: 過分的，過度的

example.en: The report criticised the manager for placing **undue** pressure on his staff.
example.zh: 這份報告批評那位經理對員工施加過度的壓力。

meaning: 波動，起伏、（聲音）忽高忽低；（音量）忽大忽小；（節奏）忽快忽慢 / adj. 波浪形的；起伏的

example.en: Golden wheat fields seemed to **undulate** gently in the warm summer breeze.
example.zh: 金黃的麥田在溫暖的夏日微風中似乎輕輕地起伏波動。

meaning: 像波浪的

example.en: The dancer's flowing scarf made soft, **undulous** shapes through the air.
example.zh: 舞者飄逸的圍巾在空中劃出柔和的、如波浪般的形狀。

meaning: 不利的；反對的；相反的；有害的；令人不快的、負面的；不喜歡的

example.en: The poor weather proved **unfavorable** for the outdoor wedding ceremony.
example.zh: 惡劣的天氣對這場戶外婚禮儀式來說很不利。

meaning: 笨手笨腳的；舉止不優雅的

example.en: The tall bird moved with an **ungainly**, awkward walk across the mud.
example.zh: 那隻高大的鳥以一種笨拙不優雅的步態走過泥地。

meaning: （有芳香味的）藥膏，油膏，軟膏

example.en: The nurse gently rubbed a soothing **unguent** onto the burned skin.
example.zh: 護士輕輕地把一種舒緩的藥膏抹在燒傷的皮膚上。

meaning: 單細胞的

example.en: Under the microscope we examined a single **unicellular** organism in pond water.
example.zh: 在顯微鏡下，我們檢視了池水中的一個單細胞生物。

meaning: （染色體之）單一性；一價

example.en: The biologist noted the **univalence** of that particular chromosome during the study.
example.zh: 生物學家在研究中記下了那條特定染色體的單一性。

meaning: 使成一體，統一，聯合；使相同；使一致、成一體，統一；成一致

example.en: The new leader hoped to **unify** the divided nation under one flag.
example.zh: 這位新領袖希望將分裂的國家統一在一面旗幟之下。

meaning: 唯一的，獨一無二的；獨特的（+to）；無可匹敵的，無與倫比的 / n. 獨一無 二的人（或事物）

example.en: Each handmade vase is **unique**, with its own colour and shape.
example.zh: 每個手工製作的花瓶都是獨一無二的，有著自己的顏色和形狀。

meaning: 和諧，一致；同度，同音；齊唱，齊奏

example.en: The whole choir sang the final chorus in perfect **unison**.
example.zh: 整個合唱團以完美的齊唱唱出最後的合唱段。

meaning: 同音的、同調的、同律的

example.en: The two bells were **unisonant**, ringing at exactly the same clear pitch.
example.zh: 那兩座鐘是同音的，以完全相同的清亮音高鳴響。

meaning: 一位論派的；一位論教義的 / n. （認為上帝只有一位的）一位論派；一位 論派教徒

example.en: The **Unitarian** church welcomed people of many different beliefs and backgrounds.
example.zh: 那座一位論派教會歡迎許多不同信仰與背景的人。

meaning: 不合法的；犯法的；不正當的；私生的

example.en: Selling these goods without a licence is completely **unlawful** here.
example.zh: 在這裡沒有執照販售這些商品是完全不合法的。

meaning: 無限制的，無約束的；無數的；無限量的

example.en: The new phone plan offers **unlimited** calls and text messages each month.
example.zh: 這個新手機方案每月提供無限制的通話和簡訊。

meaning: 不自然的，造作的；不合常理的；反常的

example.en: Her stiff, **unnatural** smile made the photograph look rather forced.
example.zh: 她僵硬、不自然的微笑讓那張照片看起來相當勉強。

meaning: 不需要的；不必要的；多餘的

example.en: We removed all the **unnecessary** details to make the report shorter.
example.zh: 我們刪除了所有不必要的細節，好讓報告更簡短。

meaning: 使心神不寧；使動搖；使不安定；使混亂

example.en: The strange noise at night began to **unsettle** the whole family.
example.zh: 夜裡那奇怪的聲音開始讓全家人心神不寧。

meaning: 不世故的，純真的；不複雜的，簡單的

example.en: The visitor admired the **unsophisticated** charm of the small fishing village.
example.zh: 這位訪客欣賞這個小漁村純樸不矯飾的魅力。

meaning: 不能以言語表達的；無法形容的；令人討厭的；極壞的

example.en: The survivors described the disaster as an **unspeakable** and lasting horror.
example.zh: 倖存者形容那場災難是一種難以言喻且揮之不去的恐怖。

meaning: 過早的；不適時的；不合時宜的

example.en: The poet's **untimely** death cut short a remarkably promising career.
example.zh: 這位詩人英年早逝，中斷了一段格外有前途的事業。

meaning: 倔強的；難對付的；不幸的；不祥的

example.en: Nothing **untoward** happened during the long flight, and we landed safely.
example.zh: 漫長的飛行中沒有發生任何不幸的事，我們平安降落了。

meaning: 非言語所能形容的，說不出的；十足的

example.en: Standing before the vast canyon, she felt an **unutterable** sense of awe.
example.zh: 站在廣闊的峽谷前，她感到一種難以言喻的敬畏。

meaning: 不靈便的；使用不便的；笨重的，龐大的

example.en: The huge old wardrobe was too **unwieldy** to carry up the stairs.
example.zh: 那個巨大的舊衣櫃太笨重了，無法搬上樓。

meaning: 不明智的；愚蠢的；欠考慮的；輕率的

example.en: It would be **unwise** to invest all your savings in one risky company.
example.zh: 把你所有的積蓄投資在一家高風險公司是不明智的。

meaning: 卸（牲口）；拆開；分散、停止工作

example.en: At dusk the farmer would **unyoke** the tired oxen and let them rest.
example.zh: 黃昏時農夫會卸下疲憊的牛，讓牠們休息。

meaning: 維修費；保養費

phrases.meaning: 使（某人）不睡覺，耽誤（某人）睡覺

example.en: The annual **upkeep** of such a large old house is very expensive.
example.zh: 這麼一棟大型老房子每年的維修費非常昂貴。

meaning: 責罵，訓斥（+for/with）

example.en: The coach began to **upbraid** the players for their careless mistakes.
example.zh: 教練開始為球員們粗心的失誤而責罵他們。

meaning: 上投物；上風井 / adj. 上投的；向上的；朝上的

example.en: Fresh air flowed steadily up the mine's main **upcast** shaft.
example.zh: 新鮮空氣穩定地沿著礦坑的主要上風井向上流動。

meaning: 動亂；動盪；騷亂；激變；劇變；脹起；鼓起；舉起；（地殼）隆起

example.en: The election caused a major political **upheaval** across the entire country.
example.zh: 這場選舉在全國各地引起了重大的政治動盪。

meaning: 漲起，鼓起；舉起；（使）隆起；（使）發生混亂

example.en: Powerful forces deep underground slowly **upheaved** the rocks into tall mountains.
example.zh: 地底深處的強大力量緩慢地將岩石隆起成高山。

meaning: 至上的；最高的；最主要的 / adv. 至上地；最高；最初

example.en: Safety remained **uppermost** in the captain's mind throughout the difficult voyage.
example.zh: 在整段艱難的航程中，安全始終是船長心中最重要的考量。

meaning: 喧囂的；騷動的；令人捧腹大笑的

example.en: The comedian's **uproarious** jokes had the whole audience laughing helplessly.
example.zh: 這位喜劇演員令人捧腹大笑的笑話讓全場觀眾笑到不行。

meaning: 連根拔；根除；滅絕；趕走；把……趕出家園、遷離；改變生活方式

example.en: The storm could **uproot** even the largest and oldest trees in the park.
example.zh: 這場暴風雨甚至能將公園裡最大最老的樹連根拔起。

meaning: 使向上；使朝上；翻轉；翻起；向上，朝上 / n. （尤指經濟的）好轉，回升，改 善(+in)

example.en: Economists predict a sharp **upturn** in the economy later this year.
example.zh: 經濟學家預測今年稍晚經濟會大幅好轉。

meaning: 都市風格；雅緻、儒雅

example.en: He greeted his rivals with surprising **urbanity** and polished good manners.
example.zh: 他以令人意外的儒雅和優雅的良好禮貌迎接他的對手。

meaning: 小淘氣；頑童

example.en: A ragged little **urchin** begged for coins outside the busy station.
example.zh: 一個衣衫襤褸的小頑童在繁忙的車站外乞討零錢。

meaning: 緊急；迫切；催促；堅持

example.en: The doctor stressed the **urgency** of treating the infection without delay.
example.zh: 醫生強調了刻不容緩治療這個感染的緊迫性。

meaning: 使用，用法；處理，對待（+of）；習慣，習俗

example.en: This dictionary explains the correct **usage** of many difficult English words.
example.zh: 這本字典解釋了許多艱難英語單字的正確用法。

meaning: 高利貸的、放高利貸的

example.en: The poor borrowers suffered under the lender's cruel, **usurious** interest rates.
example.zh: 貧窮的借款人在放款人殘酷的高利貸利率下受苦。

meaning: 篡奪，奪取（權位）

example.en: The ambitious general tried to **usurp** the throne from the rightful king.
example.zh: 那位野心勃勃的將軍企圖從合法的國王手中篡奪王位。

meaning: 放高利貸

example.en: In ancient times, charging excessive interest, or **usury**, was strictly forbidden.
example.zh: 在古代，收取過高的利息，也就是放高利貸，是被嚴格禁止的。

meaning: 實用主義；功利主義

example.en: His political views were shaped by the practical principles of **utilitarianism**.
example.zh: 他的政治觀點是由功利主義的務實原則所塑造的。

meaning: 公用事業；（電、煤氣、鐵路等）公共設施、有用性；（尤指）實用性

example.en: The new road greatly increased the **utility** of the remote farmland.
example.zh: 這條新路大大增加了這片偏遠農地的實用性。

meaning: 最大量；最高程度 / adj. 最大的；極度的

example.en: The rescue team did their **utmost** to reach the trapped climbers quickly.
example.zh: 救援隊竭盡全力盡快抵達受困的登山者那裡。

meaning: 空出，騰出

example.en: Tenants must **vacate** the apartment by noon on the last day.
example.zh: 房客必須在最後一天中午前騰空這間公寓。

meaning: 給…接種疫苗

example.en: Parents are urged to **vaccinate** their children against measles before school.
example.zh: 當局敦促家長在孩子入學前為他們接種麻疹疫苗。

meaning: 躊躇；猶豫；搖擺不定

example.en: She continued to **vacillate** between studying medicine and pursuing music professionally.
example.zh: 她在攻讀醫學和專業從事音樂之間搖擺不定。

meaning: 空洞的；無知的

example.en: His **vacuous** stare suggested he had not understood the question at all.
example.zh: 他空洞的眼神顯示他根本沒聽懂這個問題。

meaning: 真空、缺乏，空白、真空吸塵器 / v. 用吸塵器清掃

example.en: Sound cannot travel through the empty **vacuum** of outer space.
example.zh: 聲音無法穿越外太空的真空。

meaning: 流浪者；（通常指）無業遊民

example.en: The old **vagabond** wandered from town to town with all his belongings.
example.zh: 這個老流浪漢帶著他所有的家當從一個城鎮漂泊到另一個城鎮。

meaning: 流浪者；無業遊民；乞丐

example.en: The police moved a homeless **vagrant** along from the shop doorway.
example.zh: 警察把一個無家可歸的流浪漢從商店門口趕走。

meaning: 極度自負；虛榮；賣弄

example.en: His endless boasting revealed an empty **vainglory** that few people admired.
example.zh: 他無止盡的吹噓暴露出一種少有人欣賞的空洞虛榮。

meaning: （用於山谷名中）谷、山谷

example.en: A clear stream wound slowly through the peaceful green **vale**.
example.zh: 一條清澈的溪流緩緩蜿蜒穿過寧靜的綠色山谷。

meaning: 告別；告別辭

example.en: The retiring teacher gave a moving **valediction** to her grateful students.
example.zh: 這位退休教師向她感激的學生們發表了一段動人的告別辭。

meaning: （畢業典禮時）致告別辭的學生代表

example.en: As class **valedictorian**, she delivered an inspiring speech at the graduation ceremony.
example.zh: 作為畢業生致辭代表，她在畢業典禮上發表了一場鼓舞人心的演講。

meaning: （畢業生代表的）告別演講；告別辭 / adj. 告別的

example.en: In his **valedictory** address, the principal thanked everyone for thirty wonderful years.
example.zh: 在他的告別演說中，校長感謝大家三十個美好的年頭。

meaning: 有根據的；確鑿的；令人信服的；合法的；有效的；經正當手續的

example.en: The scientist presented a **valid** argument supported by years of careful research.
example.zh: 這位科學家提出了一個由多年細心研究所支持、令人信服的論點。

meaning: 英勇的，勇猛的，無畏的

example.en: The **valorous** soldier returned to rescue his wounded comrades under heavy fire.
example.zh: 那位英勇的士兵在猛烈砲火下返回救援他受傷的同袍。

meaning: 愚蠢的；無生氣的；單調的；乏味的

example.en: The film's dull plot and **vapid** dialogue bored the entire audience.
example.zh: 這部電影沉悶的情節和乏味的對白讓全場觀眾感到無聊。

meaning: 蒸餾器；噴霧器

example.en: She used a small **vaporizer** to release soothing scent into the room.
example.zh: 她用一個小型噴霧器在房間裡釋放舒緩的香氣。

meaning: 多變的；反復無常的 / n. 變數

example.en: The weather in this region is highly **variable**, changing several times daily.
example.zh: 這個地區的天氣非常多變，一天會變化好幾次。

meaning: 分歧；不同；差異、特殊許可

example.en: There was a clear **variance** between the two witnesses' accounts of events.
example.zh: 兩位證人對事件的陳述之間存在明顯的分歧。

meaning: 變體；變種；變形 / adj. 不同的；有差別的；變異的

example.en: The shop sells a cheaper **variant** of the popular branded sports shoe.
example.zh: 這家店販售那款熱門品牌運動鞋的較便宜變體版本。

meaning: 變化；變動、變種，變體；變化了的東西、變奏曲

example.en: There is wide **variation** in temperature between the day and the night.
example.zh: 白天與夜晚之間的溫度有很大的變化。

meaning: 使呈雜色；使色彩斑駁；使多樣化；使豐富多彩

example.en: The gardener chose to **variegate** the border with many brightly coloured flowers.
example.zh: 園丁選擇用許多色彩鮮豔的花朵讓花壇邊緣繽紛多彩。

meaning: （中世紀）封臣、附庸國

example.en: In medieval times, each **vassal** owed loyalty and service to his lord.
example.zh: 在中世紀，每位封臣都對其領主負有忠誠與效勞的義務。

meaning: （19世紀至20世紀初的）綜藝演出，歌舞雜耍表演

example.en: My grandparents loved the songs and dances of old-fashioned **vaudeville** shows.
example.zh: 我的祖父母喜愛舊式歌舞雜耍表演的歌曲與舞蹈。

meaning: 植物的；有關植物生長的 / n. 植物；蔬菜

example.en: The study focused on the **vegetal** growth observed in the shaded forest floor.
example.zh: 這項研究著重於在陰暗林地觀察到的植物生長。

meaning: 素食者，素食主義者 / adj. 素食的；素的；不包括肉的

example.en: As a strict **vegetarian**, she never eats meat, fish, or poultry.
example.zh: 身為一個嚴格的素食者，她從不吃肉、魚或家禽。

meaning: 過呆板單調的生活；懶散地生活

example.en: After losing his job, he began to **vegetate** at home all day.
example.zh: 失業後，他開始整天待在家裡過著呆板懶散的生活。

meaning: （總稱）植物；植被，植物群落

example.en: Thick green **vegetation** covered the hillside after months of heavy rain.
example.zh: 連續數月的大雨後，茂密的綠色植物覆蓋了山坡。

meaning: 植物的；促使植物生長的；有生長力的；植物人的

example.en: The mild climate provides ideal **vegetative** conditions for growing tropical fruit.
example.zh: 溫和的氣候為種植熱帶水果提供了理想的植物生長條件。

meaning: （感情）強烈的；猛烈的

example.en: She gave a **vehement** denial of all the charges against her.
example.zh: 她對所有針對她的指控做出了強烈的否認。

meaning: 速度；速率

example.en: Scientists measured the exact **velocity** of the ball as it fell.
example.zh: 科學家測量了球下落時的精確速度。

meaning: 天鵝絨般柔軟光滑的；（酒）醇和的；可口的

example.en: The rose petals felt soft and **velvety** against her cheek.
example.zh: 玫瑰花瓣貼著她的臉頰，感覺柔軟如天鵝絨。

meaning: 貪贓的，腐敗的，見利忘義的

example.en: The **venal** official accepted bribes in exchange for ignoring the law.
example.zh: 那名貪贓的官員收受賄賂，以換取對法律的視而不見。

meaning: 可銷售的；可用金錢購得的 / n. 可販賣的物品

example.en: The craftsman produced small wooden toys that were easily **vendible** at markets.
example.zh: 這位工匠製作的小木製玩具在市集上很容易銷售。

meaning: 販賣

example.en: The contract clearly set out the terms governing the **vendition** of the goods.
example.zh: 合約清楚地載明了規範這些貨物販賣的條款。

meaning: 小販；攤主；賣主

example.en: A street **vendor** sold hot roasted chestnuts on the cold corner.
example.zh: 一名街頭小販在寒冷的街角賣著熱騰騰的烤栗子。

meaning: 飾面薄板；鑲板、掩飾物；虛飾

example.en: Beneath his polite **veneer** lay a cold and calculating personality.
example.zh: 在他禮貌的虛飾之下，藏著一種冷酷而精於算計的性格。

meaning: 德高望重的；令人尊敬的；崇高神聖的 / n. （羅馬天主教對尚未列為聖徒 的聖潔者的尊稱）尊者、（佛教中對和尚的尊稱）師父，法師

phrases.meaning: （對英國聖公會會吏長的尊稱）尊者

example.en: The **venerable** professor had taught at the university for over fifty years.
example.zh: 這位德高望重的教授在這所大學任教超過五十年。

meaning: 尊重；敬重

example.en: Many cultures **venerate** their elders for the wisdom they have gathered.
example.zh: 許多文化敬重他們的長者，因為長者累積了智慧。

meaning: 由性交傳染的；性病的

example.en: Doctors warned the public about the spread of **venereal** diseases.
example.zh: 醫生們警告大眾要注意性病的傳播。

meaning: （錯誤行為）輕微的，可以原諒的

example.en: Arriving a few minutes late was only a **venial** and forgivable error.
example.zh: 遲到幾分鐘只是個輕微而可原諒的過錯。

meaning: 鹿肉

example.en: The restaurant serves roast **venison** with a rich berry sauce in autumn.
example.zh: 這家餐廳在秋天供應佐以濃郁莓果醬的烤鹿肉。

meaning: （蛇、昆蟲等叮咬時分泌的）毒液、憤恨，痛恨，怨恨

example.en: A single drop of the snake's **venom** can be extremely dangerous.
example.zh: 這條蛇的一滴毒液就可能極其危險。

meaning: 靜脈的

example.en: The nurse drew a sample of dark **venous** blood from his arm.
example.zh: 護士從他的手臂抽取了一份暗紅色的靜脈血樣本。

meaning: 誠實的；真實的，正確的

example.en: A **veracious** account of the events helped clear the innocent man's name.
example.zh: 對事件的真實陳述幫助洗清了這位無辜者的名聲。

meaning: 真實；誠實；實事求是

example.en: The judge questioned the **veracity** of the witness's surprising statement.
example.zh: 法官質疑這位證人那令人意外陳述的真實性。

meaning: 一字不差地；逐字地

example.en: The clerk copied the angry speech **verbatim** into the official record.
example.zh: 書記員把那段憤怒的演說一字不差地抄進官方記錄。

meaning: 冗詞，廢話，贅語

example.en: The report could be far shorter without so much unnecessary **verbiage**.
example.zh: 如果沒有這麼多不必要的冗詞，這份報告本可以短得多。

meaning: 囉嗦的；冗長的，累贅的

example.en: His **verbose** writing buried a simple idea under endless extra words.
example.zh: 他冗長囉嗦的寫作把一個簡單的概念埋在無盡的贅字之下。

meaning: 長滿綠色植物的；草木蒼翠的

example.en: After the spring rains, the **verdant** hills were covered in fresh grass.
example.zh: 春雨過後，蒼翠的山丘覆蓋著新生的青草。

meaning: 證實，證明

example.en: The bank requires further **verification** of your address before opening an account.
example.zh: 銀行在開戶前要求對你的地址做進一步的證實。

meaning: 證明；證實；核對

example.en: Please **verify** the figures carefully before submitting the final report.
example.zh: 在提交最終報告前，請仔細核對這些數字。

meaning: 真正地；真實地

example.en: He **verily** believed that hard work alone would secure his future success.
example.zh: 他真心相信光憑努力工作就能確保他未來的成功。

meaning: 真實；事實、（普遍認同的）信念，準則，真理

example.en: The documentary explores eternal **verities** about love, loss, and the human condition.
example.zh: 這部紀錄片探討關於愛、失去與人類處境的永恆真理。

meaning: 害蟲；害獸、危害社會的人，害人蟲；歹徒

example.en: Farmers spent the summer trying to keep **vermin** away from their stored grain.
example.zh: 農夫整個夏天都試圖讓害蟲遠離他們儲存的穀物。

meaning: 本地話，方言；白話、（建築的）本地風格，民間風格、（藝術的）民間風俗

example.en: The novel was written in the local **vernacular** rather than formal standard English.
example.zh: 這部小說是用當地方言而非正式標準英語寫成的。

meaning: 春天的；春季發生的

example.en: The **vernal** equinox marks the moment when spring officially begins each year.
example.zh: 春分標誌著每年春天正式開始的時刻。

meaning: 多種用途的；萬用的；多才多藝的

example.en: This **versatile** kitchen tool can chop, slice, and grate a wide range of foods.
example.zh: 這款多用途的廚房工具可以切碎、切片並研磨各種食物。

meaning: 版本；說法

example.en: The latest **version** of the software fixes several bugs from earlier releases.
example.zh: 這款軟體的最新版本修正了先前版本中的數個錯誤。

meaning: （數學裡的）頂點，角頂、頂點；最高點

example.en: Each **vertex** of the triangle was clearly labelled with a different letter.
example.zh: 三角形的每個頂點都清楚地標上了不同的字母。

meaning: 豎直的；垂直的；立式的 / n. 垂直線；垂直面；豎直位置

example.en: The cliff rose in a sheer **vertical** wall above the crashing waves below.
example.zh: 懸崖在下方拍岸的海浪之上形成一道陡峭的垂直牆面。

meaning: （從高處俯視感到的）暈眩

example.en: Standing near the edge of the tower, she suddenly felt a wave of **vertigo**.
example.zh: 站在塔的邊緣附近，她突然感到一陣暈眩。

meaning: 殘餘；遺跡

example.en: Archaeologists found only a faint **vestige** of the ancient city's outer walls.
example.zh: 考古學家只找到這座古城外牆殘餘的微弱遺跡。

meaning: 官服，禮服；法衣；祭袍

example.en: The priest put on his ceremonial **vestments** before beginning the morning service.
example.zh: 神父在開始晨間禮拜之前穿上了他的祭袍。

meaning: 否決；禁止

example.en: The president decided to **veto** the bill despite strong support in parliament.
example.zh: 儘管該法案在議會獲得強力支持，總統仍決定否決它。

meaning: 代理的；替代的；（想像別人的苦樂而）發同感的；感同身受的；間接感受 到的；間接獲得的

example.en: Many fans enjoy a **vicarious** thrill watching their favourite athletes win championships.
example.zh: 許多球迷在觀看他們最愛的運動員贏得冠軍時享受著感同身受的興奮。

meaning: 總督；線蛺蝶

example.en: The **viceroy** governed the distant colony on behalf of the absent monarch.
example.zh: 總督代表不在當地的君主治理這個遙遠的殖民地。

meaning: 變化無常；變換；盛衰；興敗

example.en: Through all the **vicissitudes** of life, she never lost her sense of humour.
example.zh: 歷經人生種種變化無常，她從未失去她的幽默感。

meaning: 爭；競爭（+with/for）、使競爭；使針鋒相對（+against）

example.en: Several companies now **vie** with each other for the same shrinking market.
example.zh: 如今好幾家公司彼此競爭同一個不斷萎縮的市場。

meaning: 警覺；警戒；警惕

example.en: The constant **vigilance** of the guards prevented any intruders from entering the compound.
example.zh: 警衛持續的警戒防止了任何入侵者進入這座院區。

meaning: 警覺的；警戒的；警惕的

example.en: Airport staff remained **vigilant** for any unattended bags throughout the busy holiday season.
example.zh: 在繁忙的假期期間，機場人員對任何無人看管的行李保持警覺。

meaning: （清晰描述特點的）短文，片段，小插曲

example.en: The book opens with a charming **vignette** of village life in the 1950s.
example.zh: 這本書以一段描繪一九五零年代鄉村生活的迷人小插曲開場。

meaning: 可征服的；易克服的

example.en: The general insisted that even the strongest enemy army was ultimately **vincible**.
example.zh: 將軍堅稱即使是最強大的敵軍最終也是可征服的。

meaning: 證明…正確；證明…是真的、證明（某人）無辜，澄清

example.en: New evidence finally helped **vindicate** the man who had been wrongly convicted.
example.zh: 新的證據最終幫助證明了這名遭錯誤定罪的男子是無辜的。

meaning: 辯護的；懲罰的；報復的

example.en: The court took a **vindicatory** approach, imposing harsh penalties on repeat offenders.
example.zh: 法院採取懲罰性的做法，對累犯施加嚴厲的刑罰。

meaning: 起辯護作用的

example.en: Her lengthy **vindicative** essay sought to defend her mentor's controversial decisions.
example.zh: 她那篇冗長且起辯護作用的文章試圖為她導師具爭議的決定辯護。

meaning: 葡萄園；葡萄溫室

example.en: They strolled through the sunny **vinery**, admiring rows of ripening purple grapes.
example.zh: 他們漫步穿過陽光普照的葡萄園，欣賞著一排排逐漸成熟的紫色葡萄。

meaning: 中世紀的六弦提琴；低音提琴

example.en: The musician carefully tuned her antique **viol** before the early music concert.
example.zh: 這位音樂家在古樂音樂會前仔細為她的古董六弦提琴調音。

meaning: 中提琴（演奏者）

example.en: She plays the **viola**, whose warm tone sits between the violin and cello.
example.zh: 她演奏中提琴，其溫暖的音色介於小提琴與大提琴之間。

meaning: 違背者；褻瀆者；侵犯者

example.en: The court fined the repeat **violator** heavily for ignoring the safety regulations again.
example.zh: 法院對這名再次無視安全規定的累犯處以重罰。

meaning: 違反，違背，違犯（尤指法律、協議、原則等）

example.en: Driving without a licence is a serious **violation** of the country's traffic laws.
example.zh: 無照駕駛是嚴重違反該國交通法規的行為。

meaning: 大提琴

example.en: He carried his **violoncello** carefully onto the stage before the evening recital.
example.zh: 在晚間獨奏會前，他小心地把大提琴搬上了舞台。

meaning: 潑婦；悍婦

example.en: The play depicts a fearsome **virago** who terrorises everyone in the small town.
example.zh: 這齣戲描繪一名令小鎮上每個人都聞風喪膽的潑婦。

meaning: 有男子氣概的；有男性魅力的；陽剛氣十足的、強有力的；強壯的

example.en: The statue portrays a **virile** young warrior holding a spear and shield.
example.zh: 這座雕像描繪一名手持長矛與盾牌、充滿男子氣概的年輕戰士。

meaning: 美術品；古董類；美術嗜好

example.en: The wealthy collector filled his mansion with rare **virtu** from across Europe.
example.zh: 這位富有的收藏家用來自全歐洲的稀有美術品填滿了他的宅邸。

meaning: 幾乎…的；實質上的、（透過電腦）虛擬的

example.en: Years of overspending left the company in a state of **virtual** bankruptcy.
example.zh: 多年的超支使這家公司陷入了實質上破產的狀態。

meaning: （尤指演奏樂器或表演的）名家，能手 / adj. 熟練的；精湛的

example.en: The young pianist is already regarded as a **virtuoso** by leading music critics.
example.zh: 這位年輕鋼琴家已被頂尖樂評人視為演奏名家。

meaning: （疾病的）致命性，嚴重性、惡毒；狠毒

example.en: Scientists studied the surprising **virulence** of the new strain spreading across the region.
example.zh: 科學家研究了在該地區蔓延的新病毒株出人意料的致命性。

meaning: 劇毒的；致命的、惡毒的，狠毒的

example.en: Doctors warned that this **virulent** infection could spread rapidly without proper precautions.
example.zh: 醫生警告說，若無適當的預防措施，這種致命的感染可能迅速蔓延。

meaning: 臉龐

example.en: A look of deep sorrow passed across the old man's weathered **visage**.
example.zh: 一抹深沉的悲傷掠過這位老人飽經風霜的臉龐。

meaning: （英國的）子爵（爵位）

example.en: The estate had belonged to the same **viscount** for over three centuries.
example.zh: 這座莊園歸同一位子爵所有已超過三個世紀。

meaning: 美景；（尤指從高處看到的）壯觀景色、前景

example.en: From the hilltop, visitors enjoy a breathtaking **vista** of the entire valley.
example.zh: 從山頂上，遊客可以欣賞到整個山谷令人屏息的壯觀景色。

meaning: 視覺的；視力的 / n. 視覺材料（展示或說明用的圖畫、照片、影片等）

example.en: The teacher used colourful charts as a **visual** aid during the science lesson.
example.zh: 老師在自然課中使用色彩繽紛的圖表作為視覺輔助材料。

meaning: 使形象化；使能被看見

example.en: Athletes often **visualize** themselves winning before they step onto the field.
example.zh: 運動員在踏上球場之前經常把自己獲勝的情景形象化。

meaning: 活力，生氣；生命力

example.en: Despite his age, the old gardener still works with remarkable energy and **vitality**.
example.zh: 儘管年事已高，這位老園丁工作起來仍展現出驚人的精力與活力。

meaning: 賦予…生命；給予…活力；激勵；生動地描繪

example.en: A good leader can **vitalize** a struggling team and restore its confidence.
example.zh: 一位優秀的領導者能夠為陷入困境的團隊注入活力並恢復其信心。

meaning: 損害；汙染；（使）無效；（使）墮落

example.en: One careless error can completely **vitiate** the results of a long experiment.
example.zh: 一個粗心的錯誤就可能完全損害一項長期實驗的結果。

meaning: 罪有應得的

example.en: The committee considered his careless behaviour thoroughly **vituperable** and worthy of public blame.
example.zh: 委員會認為他粗心的行為完全是罪有應得，理應受到公眾的指責。

meaning: 活潑；快活；有生氣

example.en: Her natural **vivacity** made her the most popular guest at every party.
example.zh: 她天生的活潑使她成為每場派對上最受歡迎的賓客。

meaning: （使）有生氣；（使）生動；（使）活躍

example.en: A skilful storyteller can **vivify** even the dullest historical events for young readers.
example.zh: 一位技巧高超的說書人能為年輕讀者把即使最枯燥的歷史事件變得生動。

meaning: 活體解剖、活體解剖術

example.en: Many activists strongly oppose the **vivisection** of animals for medical research.
example.zh: 許多行動人士強烈反對為了醫學研究而對動物進行活體解剖。

meaning: 語，單字

example.en: The dictionary lists each **vocable** along with its pronunciation and main meanings.
example.zh: 這本字典列出每個單字及其發音與主要意義。

meaning: 稱呼的

example.en: In Latin, the **vocative** case is used when directly addressing a person.
example.zh: 在拉丁文中，呼格用於直接稱呼某人時。

meaning: 喧嚷；吼叫

example.en: The sudden **vociferance** of the crowd drowned out the speaker's quiet voice.
example.zh: 群眾突然的喧嚷淹沒了演講者輕柔的聲音。

meaning: 喊叫；吶喊

example.en: The angry protesters began to **vociferate** their demands outside the government building.
example.zh: 憤怒的抗議者開始在政府大樓外吶喊著他們的要求。

meaning: 喊叫的；喧嚷的

example.en: A **vociferous** group of fans demanded that the manager be replaced immediately.
example.zh: 一群喧嚷的球迷要求立即撤換這位經理。

meaning: 流行；風行；時髦；流行物；時髦事物（人物）

example.en: Tight jeans were briefly in **vogue** before looser styles became popular again.
example.zh: 緊身牛仔褲短暫流行過一陣子，之後較寬鬆的款式才再度受歡迎。

meaning: 能飛的；飛行的；迅速的

example.en: Ancient legends often describe **volant** creatures soaring high above the mountain peaks.
example.zh: 古老的傳說常描述能飛的生物高高翱翔於山峰之上。

meaning: （液體等）易揮發的；易發作的；爆炸性的

example.en: Petrol is highly **volatile**, so it must be stored away from open flames.
example.zh: 汽油極易揮發，所以必須遠離明火儲存。

meaning: 意志；決斷力；選擇；決定

example.en: She left the company entirely of her own **volition**, without any outside pressure.
example.zh: 她完全是出於自己的意志離開了公司，沒有任何外來的壓力。

meaning: 意志的；表示祈望或准許的

example.en: The teacher explained that certain **volitive** verb forms express a wish or request.
example.zh: 老師解釋說某些表示祈望的動詞形式用以表達願望或請求。

meaning: 滔滔不絕的；健談的；口若懸河般的

example.en: The **voluble** tour guide chatted happily about local history for the entire trip.
example.zh: 這位滔滔不絕的導遊在整趟旅程中愉快地談論著當地歷史。

meaning: 性感的；激起情慾的；貪戀酒色的；縱慾的

example.en: The painting depicts a garden full of **voluptuous** flowers in rich, glowing colours.
example.zh: 這幅畫描繪一座滿是濃郁、鮮豔色彩、令人陶醉的花朵的花園。

meaning: 狼吞虎嚥的；貪婪的

example.en: As a child, she was a **voracious** reader who finished several books each week.
example.zh: 小時候，她是個如飢似渴的讀者，每週讀完好幾本書。

meaning: 渦；旋風；旋渦；渦流

example.en: The small boat was nearly pulled under by a powerful **vortex** of swirling water.
example.zh: 那艘小船差點被一股強勁的漩渦捲入水下。

meaning: 誓約的；立誓任聖職的 / n. 熱心者；崇拜者；信徒；（天主教）修士；修女

example.en: He became a devoted **votary** of the cause, attending every meeting and rally.
example.zh: 他成了這項志業的忠實信徒，參加每一場會議與集會。

meaning: 奉獻的；誠心祈求的；許願的

example.en: Pilgrims lit **votive** candles at the shrine to express their heartfelt prayers.
example.zh: 朝聖者在聖壇前點燃許願蠟燭以表達他們衷心的祈禱。

meaning: 粗俗；粗野的動作；粗俗語；下流話

example.en: The reviewer criticised the film for the **vulgarity** of its crude humour.
example.zh: 這名評論者批評這部電影粗俗的低級幽默。

meaning: 易受傷的；易受責難的；有弱點的；難防守的

example.en: Young children are especially **vulnerable** to infection during the cold winter months.
example.zh: 幼童在寒冷的冬季月份特別容易受到感染。

meaning: 流浪者；流浪兒；無主動物

example.en: The charity provides shelter and food for any homeless **waif** found on the streets.
example.zh: 這家慈善機構為街頭上發現的任何無家可歸的流浪兒提供庇護與食物。

meaning: 背心；馬夾

example.en: He wore a smart **waistcoat** beneath his jacket for the formal dinner.
example.zh: 他在正式晚宴上於外套底下穿了一件雅致的背心。

meaning: 放棄；撤回；不強求執行（規則等）；擱置；推遲

example.en: The bank agreed to **waive** the monthly fee for the first three months.
example.zh: 銀行同意在前三個月免除每月手續費。

meaning: 貝殼串；錢

example.en: The early settlers sometimes traded goods for strings of **wampum** with local tribes.
example.zh: 早期的拓荒者有時會用貨物與當地部落交換一串串的貝殼串。

meaning: （月）虧，缺；變暗淡；變小；減少 / n. 月虧；月虧期；衰退；衰退期

example.en: Public interest in the scandal began to **wane** after only a few weeks.
example.zh: 大眾對這樁醜聞的興趣僅僅幾週後就開始減退。

meaning: 放縱；嬉戲；繁茂

example.en: The teacher could not tolerate the careless **wantonness** of the unruly students.
example.zh: 老師無法容忍那些不守規矩學生那種輕率的放縱。

meaning: 好戰的；尚武的；戰爭的；軍事的

example.en: The ancient tribe was famous for its fierce and **warlike** reputation.
example.zh: 這個古老的部落以其凶猛好戰的名聲而聞名。

meaning: 小浪；微波、漣漪

example.en: A gentle breeze sent tiny **wavelets** rippling across the calm surface of the lake.
example.zh: 一陣微風使細小的漣漪蕩漾過平靜的湖面。

meaning: 軟弱的，不勇敢的；不堅定的、（強烈的情感作用下）感到軟弱無力的，膝 蓋發軟的

example.en: His **weak-kneed** response to the crisis disappointed everyone who had trusted his leadership.
example.zh: 他對這場危機軟弱的回應令所有信任他領導能力的人感到失望。

meaning: 鞭痕，（棒打的）傷痕

example.en: The fall left an angry red **weal** across the back of his hand.
example.zh: 那一摔在他的手背上留下了一道紅腫的傷痕。

meaning: 給（嬰兒或動物幼崽）斷奶

example.en: Most farmers **wean** their lambs from the ewe at around three months old.
example.zh: 大多數農夫在羔羊約三個月大時讓牠們從母羊那裡斷奶。

meaning: 使人疲倦的；令人厭倦的

example.en: The long lecture grew increasingly **wearisome** as the afternoon slowly dragged on.
example.zh: 隨著下午緩慢地過去，這場冗長的演講變得越來越令人厭倦。

meaning: 極小的，很小的；很早的

example.en: They paused for just a **wee** moment before continuing their long mountain hike.
example.zh: 他們只停下來極短的一會兒，便繼續他們漫長的登山健行。

meaning: 有教養的，受過良好教育的；良種的

example.en: Her **well-bred** manners impressed everyone she met at the formal reception.
example.zh: 她有教養的舉止令她在正式招待會上遇到的每個人都印象深刻。

meaning: 做好事的人

example.en: The village honoured the quiet **well-doer** who had helped so many needy families.
example.zh: 村莊表揚了這位幫助過許多貧困家庭、默默做好事的人。

meaning: 富有的，寬裕的

example.en: Their **well-to-do** neighbours owned two large houses and several expensive cars.
example.zh: 他們那些富有的鄰居擁有兩棟大房子與好幾輛昂貴的汽車。

meaning: （某人或某物的）行蹤，下落，去向 / adv. 在何處

example.en: Police are still trying to discover the **whereabouts** of the missing witness.
example.zh: 警方仍在試圖查明這名失蹤證人的下落。

meaning: 不久之後；馬上；於是

example.en: The bridge suddenly collapsed, **whereupon** the entire village rushed to help the trapped drivers.
example.zh: 橋樑突然倒塌，於是整個村莊的人都趕去幫助受困的駕駛人。

meaning: 無論什麼地方；去任何地方 / conj. 無論在哪裡；無論到哪裡；無論什麼情 況下

example.en: The loyal dog follows its owner **wherever** she goes around the busy farm.
example.zh: 這隻忠心的狗無論主人在這座繁忙的農場走到哪裡都跟著她。

meaning: 用以…的東西

example.en: The poor villagers lacked the tools **wherewith** to rebuild their flooded homes.
example.zh: 貧窮的村民缺乏用以重建被洪水淹沒家園的工具。

meaning: 磨，磨快；刺激，促進；增強（食欲、慾望等） / n. 磨；開胃物（如酒等）；刺激 物

example.en: The delicious smell of roast beef began to **whet** everyone's appetite for dinner.
example.zh: 烤牛肉的美味香氣開始勾起每個人對晚餐的食欲。

meaning: 想入非非的，異想天開的；怪誕的，古怪的

example.en: The artist is known for her **whimsical** drawings of dancing animals and flying houses.
example.zh: 這位藝術家以她那些跳舞的動物與飛翔的房屋的異想天開畫作而聞名。

meaning: （狗等）發哀鳴聲；（機器等）嘎嘎響；嗖嗖響、哀訴；嘀咕著說 / n. 哀鳴聲； 嗚咽聲；嘎嘎聲；嗖嗖聲

example.en: The frightened puppy began to **whine** softly when its owner left the room.
example.zh: 當主人離開房間時，受驚的小狗開始輕聲地哀鳴。

meaning: 完全地；全部；統統

example.en: The success of the project depends **wholly** on careful planning and steady teamwork.
example.zh: 這項專案的成功完全取決於審慎的規劃與穩定的團隊合作。

meaning: 揮舞（劍等）；使用（工具等）；行使（權力）；施加（影響）

example.en: As chief executive, she **wields** enormous influence over the company's future direction.
example.zh: 身為執行長，她對公司未來的方向行使著巨大的影響力。

meaning: 詭計，奸計；騙人的把戲；欺詐行為 / v. 欺騙；誘惑（+away/from/into）；消磨 ，消遣（+away）

example.en: The clever fox used every **wile** it knew to escape the hunters.
example.zh: 那隻聰明的狐狸用盡牠所知的每一個詭計來逃離獵人。

meaning: 引人注目的；迷人的；可愛的；快活的

example.en: The child gave the visitors a **winsome** smile that instantly melted their hearts.
example.zh: 那孩子給了訪客一個迷人的微笑，瞬間融化了他們的心。

meaning: 冬天的；冬天似的；寒冷的，風雪交加的

example.en: They huddled indoors during the long, **wintry** evenings of late December.
example.zh: 在十二月下旬漫長、寒冷如冬的夜晚裡，他們擠在室內取暖。

meaning: 金屬線製的；金屬絲般的；堅硬的；韌的

example.en: Despite his slim build, the climber proved surprisingly strong and **wiry**.
example.zh: 儘管身材瘦削，這名登山者卻出人意料地強壯而堅韌。

meaning: 巫術，魔法；魔力；魅力

example.en: In the old folktale, the villagers accused the strange woman of practising **witchcraft**.
example.zh: 在這則古老的民間故事中，村民指控那名奇怪的女子施行巫術。

meaning: 不明事理的；愚笨的；發瘋的

example.en: His **witless** comment during the meeting embarrassed both himself and his colleagues.
example.zh: 他在會議中那句愚笨的評論讓他自己和同事都感到尷尬。

meaning: 假作聰明的人

example.en: The clever debater easily silenced the boastful **witling** with a single sharp remark.
example.zh: 這位聰明的辯論者用一句尖銳的話便輕易讓那個假作聰明的人啞口無言。

meaning: 名言；妙語；俏皮話

example.en: The host kept the audience laughing with one clever **witticism** after another.
example.zh: 主持人用一句接一句巧妙的妙語逗得觀眾笑個不停。

meaning: 有意地；存心地

example.en: He **wittingly** ignored the warning signs and continued hiking into the storm.
example.zh: 他有意地無視警告標誌，繼續往暴風雨中健行。

meaning: （使）起皺；（使）乾癟

example.en: The hot summer sun can quickly **wizen** fruit left out in the open.
example.zh: 炎熱的夏日陽光能很快讓暴露在外的水果乾癟。

meaning: 面孔乾瘦的

example.en: A thin, **wizen-faced** old man sold newspapers on the corner every morning.
example.zh: 一個瘦削、面孔乾瘦的老人每天早上在街角賣報紙。

meaning: 有工作的人

example.en: Every honest **working-man** in the town deserves a fair and decent wage.
example.zh: 鎮上每一位誠實、有工作的人都應得到公平而體面的薪資。

meaning: 技藝平平的；一般水準的、技術純熟的；能工巧匠般的

example.en: The carpenter finished the cabinet in a neat and thoroughly **workmanlike** manner.
example.zh: 這位木匠以俐落且技術純熟的方式完成了這個櫥櫃。

meaning: 技藝；手藝；工藝

example.en: The antique table was admired for its fine craftsmanship and delicate **workmanship**.
example.zh: 這張古董桌子因其精緻的工藝與細膩的手藝而備受讚賞。

meaning: （尤指長時間的）爭論，爭辯

example.en: The two departments continued to **wrangle** over the limited annual budget for months.
example.zh: 這兩個部門就有限的年度預算持續爭論了好幾個月。

meaning: 造成，引起（災禍等）

example.en: The powerful storm threatened to **wreak** havoc on the small coastal village.
example.zh: 這場強烈的風暴可能對這個沿海小村莊造成嚴重的破壞。

meaning: 辛苦謀求；費力取得、奪取；攫取

example.en: The rebels fought hard to **wrest** control of the city from the army.
example.zh: 叛軍奮力從軍隊手中奪取這座城市的控制權。

meaning: 不幸，可憐；肮髒，惡劣、病得厲害；非常不快

example.en: The film captures the **wretchedness** of families living in the overcrowded slums.
example.zh: 這部電影捕捉了住在過度擁擠貧民窟中的家庭的不幸。

meaning: 扭動；蠕動、痛苦不安，難堪

example.en: The injured player began to **writhe** in pain on the muddy pitch.
example.zh: 受傷的球員開始在泥濘的球場上痛苦地扭動。

meaning: 筆跡；書法、（書寫或印刷的）文字、文學作品；著作、寫作；創作、（用筆） 書寫

phrases.meaning: （尤指已出版成書的）著作，作品

example.en: Her elegant **writing** filled every page of the old leather-bound diary.
example.zh: 她優雅的筆跡填滿了那本舊皮革裝訂日記的每一頁。

meaning: 諷刺的；解嘲的

example.en: He gave a **wry** smile when asked how his disastrous interview had gone.
example.zh: 當被問到他那場災難般的面試進行得如何時，他露出一抹解嘲的微笑。

meaning: 一歲；滿一歲的動物；一歲馬 / adj. 一歲的

example.en: The farmer sold a healthy **yearling** at the regional livestock market last week.
example.zh: 這位農夫上週在區域牲畜市場賣掉了一頭健康的一歲幼畜。

meaning: 狂熱者；熱心者

example.en: The political **zealot** refused to listen to any opinion that differed from his own.
example.zh: 這名政治狂熱者拒絕聆聽任何與他自己不同的意見。

meaning: （某一特定歷史時期的）時代思潮，時代精神

example.en: The exhibition perfectly captures the rebellious **zeitgeist** of the late nineteen-sixties.
example.zh: 這場展覽完美捕捉了一九六零年代末叛逆的時代精神。

meaning: 頂峰；鼎盛時期

example.en: The author reached the **zenith** of her career when she won the international prize.
example.zh: 當這位作家贏得國際大獎時，她達到了職業生涯的頂峰。

meaning: 和風，微風

example.en: A gentle **zephyr** drifted through the orchard, carrying the scent of ripe apples.
example.zh: 一陣輕柔的微風飄過果園，帶來成熟蘋果的香氣。

meaning: 黃道十二宮(圖)

example.en: Ancient astronomers divided the sky into the twelve signs of the **zodiac**.
example.zh: 古代天文學家將天空劃分為黃道十二宮的十二個星座。
